name: Canva
description: Design and visual content platform. Monitor team access and workspace.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to the Canva Developer Portal at https://www.canva.com/developers/integrations/
2. Create a new integration
3. Generate a client secret
4. Select required scopes (design:content:read, design:meta:read, profile:read)
5. Add the CompAI callback URL as a redirect URI
6. Copy your Client ID and Client Secret into CompAI
7. Click Connect to authorize

checks.name: Canva App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Canva API is accessible.
